query: is ibuprofen covered under my prescription plan?
answer:
## Drug Coverage

| Drug | Tier | Status | Requirements |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| hydrocodone-ibuprofen oral tablet 10-200 mg, 5- 200 mg, 7.5-200 mg | Preferred Generic | Covered | Prior Authorization |
| ibuprofen oral suspension 100 mg/5 ml | Preferred Generic | Covered | — |
| ibuprofen oral tablet 300 mg | Not on Formulary | Not on Formulary (Not Covered) | — |
| ibuprofen oral tablet 400 mg, 600 mg, 800 mg | Preferred Generic | Covered | — |
| ibuprofen-famotidine oral tablet 800-26.6 mg | Not on Formulary | Not on Formulary (Not Covered) | — |

## Your Cost

| Drug Type | In-Network | Out-of-Network |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Non-preferred generic and brand name drugs Specialty Drugs (per prescription or refill). You must use a specialty pharmacy for these drugs to be covered. | 20% of the allowed amount up to a $500 maximum per drug In-Network Specialty Pharmacy | Not covered Out-Of-Network Specialty Pharmacy |
| Non-preferred generic and brand name drugs | 20% of the allowed amount up to a $250 maximum per drug In-Network Mail-Order Pharmacy | Not covered Out-Of-Network Mail-Order Pharmacy |
| Preferred Generic drugs | $25 copay | Not covered |
source: Essentials Formulary Drug List (E4) | Pages 46, 50 || Premera Employees Health Plan – Standard PPO Retiree Plan | Page 18
